results.question: When were the Normans in Normandy?
results.answer: The Normans were in Normandy during the 10th and 11th centuries. They were originally Norse raiders and pirates from Denmark, Iceland, and Norway who settled in the region under their leader Rollo. This settlement was formalized when they swore fealty to King Charles III of West Francia [1][3]. The distinct cultural and ethnic identity of the Normans began to emerge in the first half of the 10th century and continued to evolve over the following centuries [2][5].
